## How to verify

<!-- A reviewer should be able to follow these steps and reproduce. -->

- [ ] `/tls-diagnose` still passes (or document the new expected state)
- [ ] All slash commands referenced still match the backend tool names (`tlsradar.*` from `app/services/mcp_services/tools/*.rb`, `beacon.*` from Beacon's `tools/list`)

- [ ] README quick-reference updated if you added/renamed a slash command
